findings.title: Local task-state lifecycle script
findings.recommendation: move reusable lifecycle checks and mutations behind Anton task-state or run commands

findings.title: Local validation or gate wrapper
findings.evidence: # check_workflow_contracts.py emits a validation receipt for local gates
findings.recommendation: model generic validation wrappers as declarative Anton gates and receipts

findings.title: Local task-state lifecycle script
findings.recommendation: move reusable lifecycle checks and mutations behind Anton task-state or run commands

findings.title: Project-specific research or infrastructure policy
findings.evidence: GPU cluster dataset benchmark experiments stay project-specific.
findings.recommendation: keep project-specific research, data, and infrastructure policy in the adopter repo

findings.title: Mandatory planning-file workflow
findings.evidence: Agents must use planning-with-files and keep task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md current.
findings.recommendation: replace mandatory planning-file language with Anton-native task or run state, keeping files only as optional projections

findings.title: Legacy or deprecated harness surface
findings.evidence: This legacy harness surface is deprecated and should be removed after migration.
findings.recommendation: delete or deprecate this surface after Anton provides equivalent coverage

findings.title: Hook or agent configuration
findings.recommendation: review side effects manually before deciding whether Anton should own the behavior

findings.title: Ambiguous local checker
findings.recommendation: inspect whether this checker is generic harness behavior or project-specific policy
